Brazil is known for holding the record for the most FIVB Volleyball World League titles. Searching for a match with these set scores, the 2012 FIVB World League final stands out: Poland defeated Brazil 3-1 with set scores 25-18, 25-20, 25-23, 25-17 (not an exact match). However, further research shows that in the 2012 FIVB World League final, Poland beat the record-holding Brazil 3-1, and the match was held at the Ergo Arena, Gdańsk/Sopot, Poland.
